data.title: Module 1: Cardiac Anatomy and Physiology
data.description: This module introduces the fundamental structure and function of the human heart and circulatory system. Trainees will learn about cardiac anatomy, blood flow pathways, electrical conduction mechanisms, and the physiological processes that maintain normal heart rhythm and circulation. The module establishes the essential clinical foundation required for understanding pacemaker therapy, cardiac rhythm disorders, and device-based cardiac management.
